name: kianabluecher--consciousness
description: Meta skill for OpenClaw (Moltbot / Clawdbot) that reads human behavior, uncovers hidden motives and patterns, and designs systems, strategies, and interventions from the thought behind them, using influence, psychology, and spirituality. Use when you want the agent to see beyond surface requests, diagnose why people act the way they do, and architect behaviorally intelligent, spiritually aligned solutions.
